---
title: "Schedule"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.schedule-page}

Here is the 15-week learning journey for **BER 640**. Each week pairs a lecture chapter with a hands-on R lab and (when due) homework, project milestones, and quizzes. Click a **topic** to open that week's page.

::: {.schedule-legend}
[How to read:]{.schedule-legend-title} {{< fa book-open >}} Lecture &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa pencil >}} Homework &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa clipboard-list >}} Project &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sched = FileAttachment("data/schedule.csv").csv()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
modNames = ({
  "Welcome": "Getting Started",
  "M1": "Foundations of Regression",
  "M2": "Categorical Predictors",
  "M3": "Multiple Regression & Interactions",
  "M4": "Model Building & Diagnostics",
  "M5": "Logistic Regression",
  "M6": "Logistic Diagnostics",
  "M7": "Generalized Linear Models",
  "M8": "Synthesis"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
months = ["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"]
fmtDate = function (d) {
  if (!d) return "";
  const p = d.split("-");
  return months[(+p[1]) - 1] + " " + (+p[2]);
}
cell = (v) => (!v || v === "--") ? html`<span class="sched-empty">·</span>` : v
pad2 = (n) => String(n).padStart(2, "0")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
scheduleTable = {
  const comps = [
    { key: "lecture", icon: "book-open",      label: "Lecture" },
    { key: "lab",     icon: "laptop-code",    label: "Lab" },
    { key: "homework",icon: "pencil",         label: "Homework" },
    { key: "project", icon: "clipboard-list", label: "Project" },
    { key: "quiz",    icon: "circle-check",   label: "Quiz" }
  ];
  const body = [];
  let cur = null;
  for (const d of sched) {
    if (d.module !== cur) {
      cur = d.module;
      body.push(html`<tr class="sched-group"><th colspan="${3 + comps.length}">${modNames[cur] ?? cur}</th></tr>`);
    }
    body.push(html`<tr>
      <td class="sched-week">${d.week}</td>
      <td class="sched-date">${fmtDate(d.date)}</td>
      <td class="sched-topic"><a href="content/${pad2(d.week)}-content.html">${d.title}</a></td>
      ${comps.map((c) => html`<td class="sched-${c.key}">${cell(d[c.key])}</td>`)}
    </tr>`);
  }
  const table = html`<table class="schedule-table table">
    <thead><tr>
      <th class="sched-week">Wk</th>
      <th class="sched-date">Date</th>
      <th class="sched-topic">Topic</th>
      ${comps.map((c) => html`<th><i class="fa-solid fa-${c.icon}"></i> ${c.label}</th>`)}
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody>${body}</tbody>
  </table>`;
  return html`<div class="schedule-scroll">${table}</div>`;
}
```

:::
